name: Engram MCP (Local Vector Database)
description: Engram is a robust, local vector database and persistent memory system for AI agents. It gives agents long-term semantic memory (HolographicBlock phase-vector store) that runs entirely on your local machine using the Model Context Protocol. Supports CPU, CUDA GPU, and Apple Silicon Metal backends. Features: semantic nearest-neighbor recall, knowledge graph edges, CRS confidence scoring, session summaries, and a background file-watcher daemon for automatic workspace ingestion.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Search persistent memory by semantic similarity. Returns ranked HolographicBlock memories.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Encode text and store it as a persistent HolographicBlock memory under a concept name.

tools.name: mcp_engram_update
tools.description: Update an existing memory block. Evaluates Lyapunov stability drift between old and new vector encodings.

tools.name: mcp_engram_forget
tools.description: Permanently delete a memory block from the manifold.

tools.name: mcp_engram_read_concept
tools.description: Fetch the full, un-truncated text body of a specific memory block by concept name.

tools.name: mcp_engram_session_start
tools.description: Call at the start of every session. Validates manifold integrity and initializes the session epistemic state.

tools.name: mcp_engram_session_end
tools.description: Call at the end of every session. Commits a session summary as a ZEDOS_PRAXIS block.

tools.name: mcp_engram_recall_recent
tools.description: Return the N most recently accessed memories, sorted by access time.

tools.name: mcp_engram_summarize
tools.description: Return a project-state digest: all pinned memories first, then the top N by CRS score.

tools.name: mcp_engram_pin
tools.description: Set a concept's CRS to 1.0 and lock it so the Autophagy Daemon never evicts it.

tools.name: mcp_engram_relate
tools.description: Create a directional knowledge graph edge between two concepts using VSA OP_BIND.

tools.name: mcp_engram_search_by_relation
tools.description: Traverse the knowledge graph. Find all concepts related to a seed concept.

tools.name: mcp_engram_visualize
tools.description: Render a BFS subgraph from a seed concept as a Mermaid diagram.

tools.name: mcp_engram_stats
tools.description: Return a health report of the geometric manifold: total memories, pinned count, CRS distribution, disk usage.

tools.name: mcp_engram_remember_solution
tools.description: Store a crystallized error→solution pair as a ZEDOS_PRAXIS block, auto-pinned to CRS=1.0.

tools.name: mcp_engram_context_for_file
tools.description: Surfaces the top 5 memories most relevant to a file path, including AST-ingested functions and structs.

tools.name: mcp_engram_watch_workspace
tools.description: Bind an OS file-watcher to a workspace directory for automatic AST extraction.

tools.name: mcp_engram_list_namespaces
tools.description: List all available memory namespaces and which one is currently active.

tools.name: mcp_engram_set_namespace
tools.description: Switch to a project-specific memory namespace. Creates the namespace if it does not exist.

tools.name: mcp_engram_export
tools.description: Export the manifold as a portable JSON array for backup or migration.

tools.name: mcp_engram_import
tools.description: Restore memories from a JSON array previously exported by mcp_engram_export.

tools.name: mcp_engram_query_with_momentum
tools.description: Momentum-assisted recall that blends semantic similarity with conceptual trajectory.

tools.name: mcp_engram_track_user
tools.description: Track a user interaction in the persistent Rooster User Model using 90/10 EMA superposition.

tools.name: mcp_engram_recall_in_file
tools.description: Spatial recall: find all AST concepts defined within a specific line range of a file.

tools.name: mcp_engram_batch_remember
tools.description: Store multiple memories in a single call. Faster than calling remember() N times.

tools.name: mcp_engram_genesis
tools.description: Inspect or re-seed the alignment genesis blocks (PRAXIS-tagged memories at CRS=1.0).

tools.name: mcp_engram_scar
tools.description: Call when a hypothesis fails. Creates a geometric repeller to avoid the same bad solution again.

tools.name: mcp_engram_verify_behavior
tools.description: Report empirical success/failure data against a ZEDOS_HYPOTHESIS block.

tools.name: mcp_engram_forget_old
tools.description: Manually trigger autophagy: evict all non-pinned memories below a CRS threshold.

tools.name: list_concepts
tools.description: List all concept names currently stored in memory.
